prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类（含理科）最低位次约25441→27215→36826→67078，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2024年新高考改革后位次大幅后移，2025年较2024年后移约3万 名，反映该校在江西物理类考生中热度持续下降；2021年计划33人，2023年34人，2024年41人，2025年72人，2026年计划107人，较2025年大幅扩招约48. 6%，扩招幅度极大，显著增加录取机会，但位次预计大幅后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 新疆大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜2026年约第131名，近年排名在127–136名之间 波动，整体稳定，属中后段211院校；2021–2026年声誉数据中均未出现新疆大学相关舆情事件，声誉平稳无重大负面或正面事件；抖音热度总排名第72位，评价 为「一般」，短视频曝光量中等，报考关注度不高；第五轮学科评估中新疆大学无A-及以上学科，学科实力整体偏弱，对高分考生吸引力有限。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 相关工科专业社会热度平稳；江西省2026年物理类考生约26.8万人，较2025年（26.6万）微增约0.5%，竞争略有加剧；新疆大学位于乌鲁木齐市，距江西省较远，跨省就读意愿受地域偏好影响，近年招生计划大幅增加也侧面反映需通过扩招吸引生源。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续后 移趋势、2026年计划大幅扩招约48.6%以及考生总数微增，在2025年基准67078名基础上预计位次将大幅后移；预测最低位次约87142名，区间86642–87642名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 25441 → 27215 → 36826 → 67078, showing a continuous backward trend. Especially after the new college entrance examination reform in 2024, the ranking shifted significantly backward, with 2025 moving about 30,000 places back from 2024, reflecting a sustained decline in popularity among Jiangxi Physics Category candidates. The enrollment plan was 33 in 2021, 34 in 2023, 41 in 2024, 72 in 2025, and 107 in 2026, a substantial expansion of about 48.6% compared to 2025, significantly increasing admission opportunities, but the ranking is expected to shift backward considerably.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xinjiang University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 131st, with rankings fluctuating between 127 and 136 in recent years, overall stable, belonging to the mid-to-late segment of 211 universities. From 2021 to 2026, no related public opinion incidents involving Xinjiang University appeared in reputation data, indicating a stable reputation with no major negative or positive events. Douyin heat ranking is 72nd, rated as 'average', with moderate short video exposure and low application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Xinjiang University had no A- or above disciplines, with overall weak academic strength, limiting its appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of related engineering majors is stable. In 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jiangxi is about 268,000, a slight increase of about 0.5% from 2025 (266,000), with slightly intensified competition. Xinjiang University is located in Urumqi, far from Jiangxi Province, and cross-province enrollment willingness is affected by regional preferences. The significant increase in enrollment plans in recent years also indirectly reflects the need to attract students through expansion.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the substantial expansion of about 48.6% in the 2026 plan, and the slight increase in total candidates, based on the 2025 benchmark of 67078, the ranking is expected to shift backward significantly. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 87142, with a range of 86642 to 87642.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Xinjiang University significantly expanded its Physics Category enrollment in Jiangxi to 107 students, with the ranking expected to shift backward to about 87142. Candidates within the predicted range (86642–87642) are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 popular majors as a reach and Tier 3 majors as a safety. Candidates with rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range can focus on reaching for popular majors such as Computer Science and Software Engineering.
